cards.title: Ferrari Partners with IBM for AI Fan Experience
cards.body: IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP are collaborating to redefine the F1 fan experience using AI technology. The partnership aims to create deeper engagement with Ferrari's global fanbase.

cards.title: xAI Shifts Focus to Natural Gas Infrastructure
cards.body: Elon Musk's xAI has pivoted toward natural gas, while SpaceX pursues orbital data centers. The move contradicts earlier promises of a solar-electric economy.

cards.title: AI Reconstructs Dead Pilots' Voices from Recordings
cards.body: Researchers used AI spectrograms to reconstruct cockpit recordings, prompting the NTSB to temporarily restrict access to its docket system. The incident raises new safety and privacy concerns.

cards.title: Google Adds Disco Ball Icons to Pixel
cards.body: Google is now offering disco ball-themed customization for Pixel home screens. The playful update reflects the company's lighter approach to design.

cards.title: AI Startups Inflate Revenue Metrics with VCs
cards.body: Some AI startups are stretching traditional 'ARR' metrics in public communications, with investors fully aware of the inflated figures. The practice raises questions about true financial health.

cards.title: SpaceX Files for $1.75 Trillion IPO
cards.body: SpaceX's S-1 filing reveals a $28 trillion total addressable market and a CEO pay package tied to Mars colonization. The 36-page risk factor section underscores the company's ambitious plans.

cards.title: Google Search AI Breaks on Word 'Disregard'
cards.body: Google's latest search AI update causes the interface to malfunction when users search for the word 'disregard'. The bug highlights challenges in scaling AI-powered search.

cards.title: Google Demos Android XR AI Glasses Prototype
cards.body: Google showcased prototype Android XR glasses featuring Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and real-time information overlays. The devices represent significant progress toward practical AR glasses.

cards.title: Spotify and Universal Enable AI Music Covers
cards.body: Spotify partnered with Universal Music Group to allow Premium subscribers to create AI-generated song covers and remixes. Participating artists will share in the revenue generated.

cards.title: Alternative Search Engines Rise as Google Changes
cards.body: As Google integrates more AI features, users are exploring alternative search engines. The shift reflects growing skepticism about AI-driven search results.

cards.title: Trump Delays AI Security Executive Order
cards.body: President Trump postponed signing an executive order requiring pre-release government security reviews of AI models. He cited problematic language as the reason for delay.

cards.title: Spotify Adds AI Q&A Features for Podcasts
cards.body: Spotify is rolling out AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation tools for podcast content. Users can now generate daily or weekly summaries based on custom prompts.

cards.title: Spotify Launches Research Preview Desktop App
cards.body: Spotify is releasing a new desktop app as a research preview in 20+ markets, directly competing with Google's NotebookLM. The tool focuses on AI-powered research capabilities.

cards.title: Spotify Releases ElevenLabs-Powered Audiobook Tool
cards.body: Spotify launched an AI audiobook generation tool powered by ElevenLabs, offering authors freedom to publish anywhere. No exclusive contracts are required.

cards.title: The Path Offers Safer AI Mental Health Support
cards.body: Founded by Tony Robbins and Calm alums, The Path scores 95 on Vera-MH mental health safety benchmarks, significantly above consumer bots at 65. The company positions itself as a safer alternative for AI therapy.

cards.title: Hark Raises $700M for Universal AI Interface
cards.body: Secretive AI startup Hark is developing multimodal models launching this summer for a personal AI platform. The company plans to follow with custom hardware devices.

cards.title: Google Pitches AI Agents to Confused Consumers
cards.body: Google's I/O conference showcased AI agents for consumer web interaction, but messaging remained unclear. The ambitious concept faces skepticism from potential users.

cards.title: AI Recycling Startups Tap 20% Aluminum Price Surge
cards.body: Recycling startups are deploying AI to improve critical mineral recovery, targeting aluminum as a major opportunity. Rising aluminum prices make AI-optimized recycling increasingly viable.

cards.title: Jensen Huang Identifies $200B AI Agent CPU Market
cards.body: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang projects a massive $200 billion market for CPUs designed specifically for AI agents. The prediction signals Nvidia's pivot beyond GPU dominance.

cards.title: Ferrari Uses IBM AI to Redefine F1 Fan Experience
cards.body: IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP are leveraging AI to create immersive superfan experiences. The partnership demonstrates how machine learning can transform sports engagement.

cards.title: AI Reconstructs Dead Pilots' Voices from Cockpit Recordings
cards.body: Researchers used AI spectrograms to reconstruct pilot voices from archived cockpit data, raising serious safety concerns. The NTSB temporarily blocked access to its docket system in response.

cards.title: VCs and AI Startups Inflate Revenue Metrics for Growth
cards.body: Some AI startups stretch traditional ARR metrics when publicizing progress, with investor awareness. The practice inflates perception of AI startup success and valuation.

cards.title: Google Search AI Update Breaks Word 'Disregard'
cards.body: Google's AI search update causes the word 'disregard' to malfunction within the search interface. The bug highlights unexpected vulnerabilities in AI-powered search systems.

cards.title: Google Demos Gemini-Powered AR Glasses Prototype
cards.body: Google showcased prototype Android XR glasses overlaying AI-driven translation, navigation, and information. The Gemini-powered system delivers real-time contextual data directly into users' field of view.

cards.title: Spotify Partners Universal Music for AI Song Covers
cards.body: Spotify and Universal Music enable Premium subscribers to create AI-generated covers and remixes with artist revenue sharing. The partnership legitimizes fan-made AI music creation.

cards.title: Trump Delays AI Security Executive Order Signing
cards.body: President Trump postponed signing an executive order requiring pre-release government security reviews of AI models. He cited dissatisfaction with the order's language as the reason for delay.

cards.title: Spotify Adds AI Podcast Q&A and Briefing Features
cards.body: Spotify rolls out AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation for podcasts with custom prompt support. Users can generate daily or weekly summaries tailored to their interests.

cards.title: Spotify Launches ElevenLabs AI Audiobook Creation Tool
cards.body: Spotify's new AI audiobook generator uses ElevenLabs technology without requiring author exclusivity agreements. Authors retain freedom to publish generated audiobooks anywhere.

cards.title: The Path Offers AI Therapy with Mental Health Safety Focus
cards.body: The Path's AI model scores 95 on the Vera-MH mental health safety benchmark, far exceeding consumer AI chatbots. Founded by Tony Robbins and Calm alums, it prioritizes safer therapeutic interactions.

cards.title: Hark Raises $700M for Universal AI Interface Platform
cards.body: Hark plans to release multimodal AI models this summer powering a personal platform integrating existing services. The company also plans hardware devices built specifically for their AI systems.

cards.title: Google Pitches Confusing AI Agent Ecosystem to Consumers
cards.body: Google I/O introduced AI agents as a new consumer web interface, but messaging was unclear. The feature represents one of the conference's most promising yet confusing announcements.

cards.title: Recycling Startups Use AI to Recover Critical Minerals
cards.body: AI technology is improving aluminum recovery in recycling operations as prices surge 20%. Startups aim to build massive new metal supply chains through intelligent recycling.

cards.title: Jensen Huang Predicts $200B AI Agent CPU Market for Nvidia
cards.body: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang identified a brand-new $200 billion market opportunity in CPUs for AI agents. The prediction positions Nvidia for growth beyond GPUs in enterprise AI infrastructure.

cards.title: Anthropic's Code with Claude Shows Coding's AI Future
cards.body: Anthropic demonstrated advanced coding capabilities at its developer event in London. The showcase highlights how AI coding assistants are reshaping software development workflows.

cards.title: Google I/O Reveals AI-Driven Science Shift and World Models
cards.body: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis proclaimed we're approaching AI singularity during I/O keynote. Recent developments with world models are reshaping how AI tackles scientific problems.

cards.title: Can AI Learn to Understand the World? Expert Roundtable
cards.body: AI companies seek systems that understand the external world beyond LLM limitations. World models have become central to advancing AI's real-world comprehension capabilities.

cards.title: Scaling Creativity in the Age of AI and Storytelling
cards.body: AI is transforming how humans express and distribute creative narratives across mediums. Technology integration continues reshaping storytelling from production to distribution.

cards.title: US Scrambles to Stop Internet Users Recreating Dead Pilots
cards.body: Using AI spectrograms, internet users recreated voices of deceased pilots from cockpit recordings. Federal authorities moved quickly to restrict public access to prevent widespread misuse.

cards.title: AI Author's Book Contains Synthetic Quotes, Wants to Continue
cards.body: An author discovered AI-generated synthetic quotes inserted into their published work through AI tools. Despite ethical concerns, the author wishes to continue using AI in writing.

cards.title: Trump Cancels AI EO After Top Firm CEOs Decline Event
cards.body: Trump abruptly canceled an executive order signing event after major AI company CEOs refused attendance. The incident highlights tensions between the administration and AI industry leadership.
